description: Letter in Arabic in which a teacher reports to "my lord the Kohen" that the boy Mūsā had come to school after having absented himself for some days. However when he was asked to revise the Bible reading he swore he would never read more than one time and when the teacher asked him to repeat, he ran away. The teacher ran after and shouted at him, but he would not return. The teacher now asks the addressee's help. "If he does not revise it four or five times, he will not memorize it." Information from Goitein's note card.
description_he: מכתב בערבית ממורה ל'אדוני הכהן' על הנער מוסא שהיעדר מהכיתה ואז סירב לחזור על קריאת התורה יותר מפעם אחת וברח, ומבקש עזרה.
